title: Folder

remote_id.description: The third-party API ID of the matching object.

created_at.description: The datetime that this object was created by Merge.

modified_at.description: The datetime that this object was modified by Merge.

folder_url.description: The URL to access the folder.

parent_folder.description: The folder that the folder belongs to.

drive.description: The drive that the folder belongs to.

remote_created_at.description: When the third party's folder was created.

remote_updated_at.description: When the third party's folder was updated.

remote_was_deleted.description: Indicates whether or not this object has been deleted in the third party platform. Full coverage deletion detection is a premium add-on. Native deletion detection is offered for free with limited coverage. [Learn more](https://docs.merge.dev/integrations/hris/supported-features/).

description:
# The Folder Object
### Description
The `Folder` object is used to represent a collection of files and/or folders in the workspace. Could be within a drive, if it exists.
### Usage Example
Fetch from the `GET /api/filestorage/v1/folders` endpoint and view their folders.
